channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Building an AI-Powered Finance Tracker with GoLang, Telegram Bot & Claude
item.description: I wanted to practice Go regularly by building real projects, so I decided to solve a problem I personally face: expense tracking. For the last few months, my money management has been messy. I...

item.title: Why hard contracts beat soft conventions when working with AI coding agents
item.description: A retrospective on building PDLC — 31 slash commands that force my Claude Code workflow to actually finish features. Six months of pair-programming with Claude Code taught me one uncomfortable...

item.title: I Spent 3 Hours Fighting My Resume in Word. Then I Found Typst — and Never Looked Back.
item.description: How a nerdy typesetting language quietly became the best resume tool I've ever used — and why a free browser tool just made it stupidly easy for everyone. Visual Typst Resume Builder — Free...

item.title: Automatizar tareas de Outlook es más fácil de lo que pensaba
item.description: Siempre he sabido que puedes conectarte a servicios de email mediante APIs y OAuth. Pero sinceramente: nunca me ha gustado. Entre registrar aplicaciones, configurar permisos, pelearte con el login...

item.title: Your Vibe-Coded Side Hustle Has No Customers — And It's Not Because of the Code
item.description: Business Insider ran a piece last month: "Good Vibes Won't Help Your Vibe-Coded Side Hustle Win." The headline is brutal. The data is real. I want to dig into why — because the takeaway isn't...

item.title: Compass v1.1.0 · we shipped a memory plugin that catches its own consumption drift
item.description: Compass v1.1.0 · the recall consumption fix We shipped nautilus-compass v1.1.0 12 hours after v1.0.0. v1.0.0 was the public stable cut. v1.1.0 fixes a class of failure that v1.0.0 surfaces but...

item.title: Gemini will use Volvo’s external cameras to interpret parking signs
item.description: Gemini is gaining the power of sight and mobility. Today at the I/O conference, Google and Volvo announced that the AI-powered assistant will be able to access external cameras in the upcoming...

item.title: Spec2PR: The Design-First Pipeline
item.description: Spec2PR: The Design-First Pipeline On a large delivery program, one of the most expensive things you can do is start a LARB (Architecture Review Board) review with an incomplete document. I know...

item.title: How to Actually Design an AI Agent: Tools and the Starting Loop (Part 2)
item.description: TL;DR The model matters, but tools matter at least as much. Weak tool descriptions are one of the easiest agent failures to diagnose, and one of the most common. Design the tools before the agent....

item.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash Developer Guide
item.description: Gemini 3.5 Flash is generally available (GA), stable, and ready for scaled production use. As our most intelligent Flash model, it delivers sustained frontier performance in agentic execution,...

item.title: The 13 biggest announcements at Google I/O 2026
item.description: Google's I/O 2026 keynote today was once again full of AI-related announcements including a new family of Gemini 3.5 AI models, new features for Search and Gmail, and updates about its Project...

item.title: Production-Ready Django, Celery, and Redis: The Definitive Guide to Scaling Background Tasks
item.description: This article was originally published on rahulbaberwal.com Read the original with full code examples & interactive syntax highlighting → In a modern web application, responsiveness is paramount....

item.title: Google’s Genie world model can now simulate real streets with Street View
item.description: Google DeepMind is integrating Street View with Project Genie to create immersive, interactive world simulations for robotics, gaming, and travel, allowing users to explore environments, weather...

item.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots
item.description: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and...

item.title: How to use Google’s new information agents
item.description: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.

item.title: Google wants to compete with Anthropic’s Mythos
item.description: Google is making a big push into cybersecurity. At I/O, the company announced that it was inviting select groups of experts to test the API for CodeMender, an "AI agent for code security" it...

item.title: Google Search as you know it is over
item.description: Google is transforming Search from a list of links into an AI-powered experience filled with conversational answers, autonomous agents, and interactive interfaces — a shift that could further...

item.title: Google’s AI Studio now lets anyone build Android apps in minutes
item.description: Google unveiled new web-based AI tools that can generate native Android apps in minutes, as the company expands its push into AI-powered software development.

item.title: Agentic app coding gets an upgrade with Google’s release of Android CLI
item.description: Google is embracing the rise of AI coding agents with new Android tools designed to work with platforms like Claude Code and OpenAI’s Codex, allowing developers — or their AI assistants — to build...

item.title: Google adds voice-based prompting to Docs and Keep
item.description: Google is letting users create drafts, take notes, and search for email with voice with the new Workspace update

item.title: Google’s AI now lets you talk to your Gmail inbox
item.description: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

item.title: Google just declared itself a contender in AI design
item.description: The tech giant says it's designed the app to be accessible to everyone, from teachers to small business owners.

item.title: Google’s Gemini Omni turns images, audio, and text into video — and that’s just the start
item.description: Google's Gemini Omni is a new multimodal model that reasons across text, images, audio, and video to generate and edit videos through simple conversation — starting with Omni Flash.

item.title: Google can now vibe-code you an Android app
item.description: Google is announcing a major upgrade to one of its vibe coding platforms: Beginning today, you can now use AI Studio to build native Android apps. With Google AI Studio, you can prompt your idea...

item.title: Would you let robots spend your money? Google is betting on it
item.description: Google is going all in on AI-driven shopping even as some competitors back off. At Google I/O, the company unveiled the latest iteration of its AI commerce tools: a "Universal Cart" that works...

item.title: Google Search is getting its biggest changes ever
item.description: Google Search is entering the next phase of its AI evolution. During Google I/O 2026, the company showed off a reimagined search box that makes it easier to flow between AI Overviews, the...

item.title: Gmail is going to start talking to you
item.description: Google is launching a big new feature for Gmail called Gmail Live, a new AI-powered voice mode that's basically the Gemini Live experience but built specifically for your inbox. To use Gmail Live,...

item.title: Google is launching its own version of OpenClaw
item.description: Google is launching its own take on OpenClaw, the buzzy AI agent platform that caused a stir in the tech industry earlier this year. Announced during Google I/O 2026, Gemini Spark is an always-on...

item.title: Google Pics is a new app that tries to fix AI image editing
item.description: Google is launching a new AI image generation app to Workspace that it's calling Pics, and it has a new feature to try and reduce the hassle of iterating on AI images: Instead of having to write...

item.title: A first (and second) look at the Android XR glasses launching this year
item.description: I first put on a pair of prototype Android XR glasses nearly a year and a half ago. We still have months to go before any Android-powered smart glasses are available, but Google is finally ready...
